result.title: The facts on AI and the American economy from our CEO Jensen Huang.
result.description:
"AI has created more than half a million jobs. Companies that use AI grow faster. When they grow faster, they hire more people."

NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang counters threats of job displacement in his conversation with SCSP's Ylli Bajraktari on Memos to the President.

Watch the full episode: https://nvda.ws/4n1RnEh

result.title: NVIDIA Delivers the Lowest Token Cost
result.description:
When it comes to inference TCO, token cost is the metric that determines whether AI can scale efficiently and profitably in the real world, not compute cost or FLOPS per dollar.

It’s the one TCO metric that directly accounts for hardware performance, software optimization, ecosystem support and real-world utilization — and NVIDIA delivers the lowest cost per token in the industry is available through leading providers like CoreWeave, Nebius, Nscale and Together AI.

Unpack why token cost is the most important business metric for AI ⬇️

result.title: Physics-Grounded AI: How Dassault Systèmes Is Redefining Industrial Intelligence - Ep. 296
result.description:
Can industrial AI do more than just observe?

Nicolas Cerisier, Vice President of 3DEXPERIENCE Platform R&D at Dassault Systèmes, explains how the shift from SaaS to "Agent-as-a-Service" is introducing "Industry World Models" that understand the scientific laws of physics and engineering to power autonomous virtual companions.

🎧 Watch the episode: https://nvda.ws/48s9oWj

result.title: Think You Know AI? 25 Startups Prove You Wrong
result.description:
AI isn’t just about chatbots and automation—startups are finding unexpected, creative ways to apply it to the world's hardest problems in ways you might not imagine. In this session, we’ll spotlight 25 innovative use cases that reveal the breadth and depth of what’s possible when bold founders with big visions meet cutting-edge technology. Get ready to expand your view of AI’s potential and discover opportunities you didn’t see coming.

Chapters:
0:00 Intro
2:40 Agriculture
8:10 Community Protection
13:25 Environment and Climate
18:08 Energy Security
23:43 Individual Safety
28:44 Next-Gen Science

result.title: How Dassault Systèmes Is Building AI That Understands Physics | NVIDIA AI Podcast Ep. 296
result.description:
Generative AI can predict whether a plane takes off—but does it know why? Nicolas Cerisier, VP of 3DEXPERIENCE Platform R&D at Dassault Systèmes, explains how industrial world models go beyond pattern recognition to embed the actual laws of physics, chemistry, and engineering. 

In this episode of the NVIDIA AI Podcast, he also breaks down Dassault's three virtual companions (AURA, LEO, and MARIE), their 25-year collaboration with NVIDIA, and a stunning real-world use case: helping NIAR rebuild aircraft designs part by part, using AI.

🔬Topics covered:

What makes industrial world models different from LLMs

Virtual companions as AI coworkers—augmenting, not replacing engineers

IPLM: how Dassault tracks every AI interaction for auditability

Hybrid AI model strategy: NIMs, Nemotron, Mistral, + custom fine-tuning

The future: always-on agents that continuously optimize your factory

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction & Dassault Systèmes Overview
03:22 Industry World Models Explained
07:28 Meet the Virtual Companions: Aura, Leo & Marie
09:58 Trust, Traceability & the NVIDIA Partnership
14:04 Hybrid AI Strategy & Real-World Use Cases
20:43 The Future: Always-On Autonomous Agents
22:05 Where to Learn More & Closing

Learn more: https://blog.3ds.com/topics/company-news/industrial-ai-with-virtual-twins/
